hero.sub: From blockchain basics to deploying production-grade programs — structured learning paths, live challenges, and a global community of 34,000+ builders.
hero.cardDesc: Implement an AMM with concentrated liquidity from scratch using Anchor.

paths.sectionTitle:
Structured paths to
real Solana mastery
paths.sectionSub: Not just videos — every path combines theory, hands-on builds, and live code challenges.

cards.title: Solana Foundations
cards.desc: Master the core architecture — accounts, programs, PDAs, and the Sealevel runtime. The base everything else is built on.

cards.title: Build On-chain Programs
cards.desc: Write, deploy, and test Rust-based Solana programs using the Anchor framework. Go from local validator to mainnet.

cards.title: DeFi & Token Programs
cards.desc: Create SPL tokens, liquidity pools, and integrate with major Solana DeFi protocols. Build the infrastructure others build on.

features.sectionSub: Every feature is designed around one question: what actually gets people shipping on Solana?

items.title: Structured Learning Paths
items.desc: Curated sequences that take you from zero to deploying on mainnet. No guesswork, no rabbit holes — a clear road from concept to shipped code.

items.title: On-chain Credentials
items.desc: Earn verifiable certificates minted as Solana NFTs. Your achievements live permanently on-chain — not in a PDF someone can fake.

items.title: Live Coding Challenges
items.desc: Weekly challenges tied to real ecosystem problems. Ship working code, get reviewed by top contributors, and build a public track record.

items.title: Superteam Community
items.desc: Direct access to 8,000+ Solana builders, founders, and contributors across 35+ countries. Find collaborators, get feedback, get hired.

items.title: Expert-Led Workshops
items.desc: Live sessions with core Solana contributors, protocol engineers, and founders who've shipped. Real war stories, not polished slide decks.

items.title: Progress Analytics
items.desc: A personal dashboard tracks your XP, streak, skill graph, and course velocity — so you always know where you stand and what to tackle next.

testimonials.sectionTitle:
Builders who shipped
after Superteam Academy

items.quote: Six months ago I had zero blockchain experience. After completing the Foundations path I landed a full-time role at a Solana-native startup. The quality here is unmatched.
The Anchor course is the most thorough resource I've found anywhere — better than the official docs. The live challenges pushed me to actually ship, not just watch.
Superteam Academy connected me to the exact people who became my co-founders. The community alone is worth 10x the course cost.

cta.title:
The fastest way to go
from curious to shipping.
cta.sub: No paywalls. No trials. No credit card — ever. Just build.

footer.tagline: The fastest path from curious to building on Solana. Structured learning, real challenges, global community.
